_note: Copy to ~/.sqlit/keymaps/<name>.json and set 'custom_keymap' to '<name>' in settings.json.
_help: Only list the bindings you want to change — your entries merge over the defaults. See docs/custom-keymaps.md for the full action list.

leader_commands._comment: Add a new leader binding to refresh the tree on <leader>R
leader_commands.label: Refresh tree

action_keys._comment: Use ctrl+enter to execute queries in normal mode (instead of <enter>)
Autocomplete cycling: ctrl+n / ctrl+p (instead of ctrl+j / ctrl+k)
